events.title: IPL EUROPEAN CHAMPIONSHIPS, ITALY
events.description:
Online Entry: Opening early 2026

Deadline: 150 lifters max
Registration closes: N/A

Details

 

Lifters must achieve a qualifying total in a UKIPL event.

State, National, European and World records can be set

 

Classification

Check the Classification charts to see if you have a Class 2 total for full power, bench or deadlift.

Men’s and Women’s Classification chart: https://powerlifting-ipl.com/classification-standards/

 

UKIPL President: Dayle Longford
Email: info@powerliftingukipl.org

 

Additional Information:

Wait for it… It’s worth the wait! 👀🔥

This year, 2025, the IPL European Championship is coming to ITALY🏆 in collaboration with IPL International!

Important to know:
✅ IPL European Championship
🗓️ Date: June 27 – 28, 2026
📍 Location: Sports Centre Tourist Monti Lessini Locailta, Contrada Carcaro, 37021 Bosco Chiesaanuova, VR ITALY>

Qualification Requirements:
🏋 Class 2 – According to IPL Classification Standards
📜 Achieved at an IPL affiliated Meet
⏳ Timeframe: January 1, 2024 –  May 1st, 2026
📝IPL-Membership: A valid and personal IPL-member ship

 

IPL Italy European Championship – Travel & Competition Plan
27–28 June | Italy
 
We are proud to confirm that our team will be travelling to Italy to compete at the IPL European Championships, taking place on 27th and 28th June. Below is the full travel and accommodation plan for the trip for a lot of the team UK, Your welcome to arrange any other flights which suit where you are based. 
 
Travel Schedule
 
Outbound Flight:
Manchester → Milan
26th June – 08:30 departure
Flight details:
https://skyscanner.app.link/8oyZqY0DTZb
Return Flight:
Milan → Manchester
29th June – 18:35 departure
A hire car will be used for travel within Italy.
 
Friday – Weigh-Ins & Verona Stay
On Friday afternoon, we will travel from Milan to Verona for the ladies’ weigh-ins.
 
Accommodation (2 nights):
 
Hotel Maxim, Verona
https://www.maximverona.it/A
Competition Days
 
Saturday 27th June: Competition Day
 
Sunday 28th June: Competition Day
Sunday Night – Milan
 
After the competition on Sunday, we will return to Milan and stay overnight at:
 
QC Room Milano Porta
https://www.qcterme.com/it/destinazioni/milano/hotel-qc-room-milano
 
Monday – Recovery & Return
On Monday morning, we will use the QC Terme Spa for recovery before travelling back to Milan Airport, returning the hire car, and flying home.
 
This trip represents an important milestone for our lifters and the club as a whole. Thank you to everyone supporting us as we prepare to compete on the European stage. Further updates will be shared throughout the journey and competition weekend. If you plan to attend please message 07769212429 to be added to the whatsapp group.
 
 

 

ENTRY LINK European Championship Powerlifting – IPL Italia

Meet Director:  

 Aldo Codognola
+39 3514004838
info@iplitalia.it

Format of Meet
  • Full Power
  • Bench Press Only
  • Deadlift Only
  • Multi Ply (BPO, DLO only)
   
Gear Category Allowed
  • Raw
  • Classic Raw
  • Single Ply
  • Multi Ply (BPO, DLO only)
Maximum Number of Lifters:  75 per day, single platform

Entry Fee:              100
                               
Entry Fee:              100
(Students)

Crossover Fee:       70
Payment Information:  
Era Srl
Plazza Papa Giovanni XXIII
38061 Ala TN – Italy
 
Refund policy:  No refunds, no transfers

Meet T-shirt:   YES – $20		  

 

Meet Start Time:               9:30 a.m.
   
Weigh-in Time(s):             
 Friday:  June 26, 2026:   
 All Females.  Men up to 75kg:        
            9:00a.m. – 12:00 and 4:00- 6p.m.
 Saturday: June 27, 2026:
All Males 82.5 to 140+:
           9:00a.m. – 12:00 and 4:00- 6p.m.   

       
   
Awards info/comments:  Medals / Best Lifters
   

Qualifier for 2026 IPL Olympia Pro Powerlifting with an Elite total. 


Qualifier for 2026 Drug Tested IPL World Championship with a Class 1 total. 


Men’s and Women’s Classification chart: https://www.powerlifting-ipl.com/classification-standards/

The more you know, the better! Stay tuned for more details. 🚀

–

events.title: Northern Strength – September 5th – British Powerlifting Qualifier for UKIPL & GPC Combined
events.description:
Get Ready to Test Your Strength!

 

Prepare to take on the Warrington Power Challenge, an exciting powerlifting event brought to you by the dynamic Tom Smith. This is your opportunity to demonstrate your strength, set new personal records, and be part of a high-energy strength competition. Hosted at the heart of Warrington, it’s a day filled with power, determination, and a vibrant lifting community.

 

📅 Date: September 5th

📍 Venue: Northern Strength, Unit 1 Pitt Street, Warrington, WA5 0LS

🕘 Start Time: 10:00 AM

Limited to 40 Entries

 

Event Highlights:

  • Promoted by the enthusiastic Tom Smith
  • Open to powerlifters of all weight categories and skill levels
  • Medals for Top 3 of each class
  • Top-notch equipment in a dynamic fitness environment
  • A welcoming and encouraging atmosphere for both newcomers and seasoned competitors
  • Opportunities to connect with fitness enthusiasts, coaches, and dedicated athletes
  • Competition Equipment:
  • On platform:
  • Mono lift, Competition bench, Deadlift platform.
  • Squat, Bench, Deadlift bars being used.
  • Warm up area:
  • 1 Mono lift, 1 Squat rack, 2 competition Benches, 2 Deadlift platforms
  • 2 Squat Bars, 2 Bench Bars, 2 Deadlift Bars.

Why Choose the Warrington Power Challenge:

  • Experience the thrill and camaraderie of a competitive powerlifting event
  • Push your limits and uncover your true strength potential
  • Gain inspiration from fellow athletes pushing themselves to the max
  • Enjoy a day filled with fitness, challenge, and a supportive lifting community
  • Overall Male & Female will be determined on best dots score.

Competition Photos:

                We have a dedicated professional photographer to capture all your amazing feats of strength, you can pre order your packages to be sure she gets your best shots. Please drop  abitaylorphoto Instagram a message. 

 

Sign Up & Learn More: Ready to take on the challenge and make your mark? Register now to secure your spot on the platform !!!ENTRY OPEN Warrington Power Challenge – Sep-5th– UKIPL – United Kingdom’s Premier Powerlifting Hub

 

Elevate your strength, embrace the challenge, and be part of an extraordinary day at the Warrington Power Challenge. We’re excited to witness your achievements! 🏆💪

 

Weigh-In Times – Please note: Twenty-four hours prior to the competition, if it begins at 9 a.m., the weigh-in would occur from 9 to 10 a.m. on the day before the competition. Conversely, if the competition starts at 10 a.m., the weigh-in would be scheduled from 10 to 11 a.m. on the preceding day. Additionally, there is an afternoon weigh-in from 5 to 6 p.m. on that day. On the day of the competition itself, the weigh-ins will be conducted from 7 to 8 a.m. if the competition commences at 9 a.m., or from 8 to 9 a.m. if the competition starts at 10 a.m.

Remote weigh ins are available when organised with an UKIPL referee please email to arrange a weigh in slot with a referee closer to your location, weigh in times must still be abided by. info@powerliftingukipl.org

 

Please use this qualification standards calculator – to get to IPL British you need class 11 Qualification to get an entry: Classification Standards – IPL Powerlifting (powerlifting-ipl.com)

events.title: Rotherham Strength Showdown – September 19th – British Powerlifting Qualifier for UKIPL & GPC combined
events.description:
🏋️‍♂️ Rotherham Strength Showdown – September 19th 🏋️‍♀️

Prepare to Showcase Your Strength!

This event is a British Powerlifting Qualifier

Step up to the challenge at the Rotherham Strength Showdown, an exhilarating powerlifting event promoted by Keenan Freer. This is your moment to shine, set new records, and be a part of a thrilling strength competition. Hosted at the renowned Madhouse Gym, it’s a day filled with power, passion, and unparalleled energy.

📅 Date: September 19th

📍 Venue: Madhouse Gym, Greasbrough Street, Rotherham, S60 1RF

🕘 Start Time: 10:00 AM

Limited to 40 Entries

Event Features:

  • Event promoted by the esteemed Keenan Freer
  • Open to a wide range of weight categories and skill levels
  • Medals for Top 3 of each class
  • Top-notch equipment in a state-of-the-art fitness environment
  • A supportive community atmosphere, welcoming both new and experienced competitors
  • Networking with fitness enthusiasts, trainers, and professional athletes
  • Competition Equipment:
  • On platform:
  • Mono lift, Competition bench, Deadlift platform.
  • Squat, Bench, Deadlift bars being used.
  • Warm up area:
  • 2 Mono lifts, 2 competition Benches, 2 Deadlift platforms
  • 2 Squat Bars, 2 Bench Bars, 2 Deadlift Bars.

Why Join Us:

  • Experience the thrill and camaraderie of a competitive powerlifting event
  • Push your limits and discover your true strength potential
  • Get inspired by athletes at the top of their game
  • Enjoy a day of fitness, fun, and inspiration in a vibrant gym setting
  • Overall Male & Female will be determined on best dots score.

Competition Photos:

                We have a dedicated professional photographer to capture all your amazing feats of strength, you can pre order your packages to be sure she gets your best shots. Please drop  abitaylorphoto Instagram a message. 

 

Sign Up & Learn More: Ready to lift and roar? Register now to claim your spot on the platform! ENTRY LINK 2026 UKIPL & GPC Rotherham Strength Showdown

Elevate your strength, challenge your spirit, and be a part of something extraordinary at the Rotherham Strength Showdown. We can’t wait to cheer you on! 🏆💥

Weigh-In Times – Please note: Twenty-four hours prior to the competition, if it begins at 9 a.m., the weigh-in would occur from 9 to 10 a.m. on the day before the competition. Conversely, if the competition starts at 10 a.m., the weigh-in would be scheduled from 10 to 11 a.m. on the preceding day. Additionally, there is an afternoon weigh-in from 5 to 6 p.m. on that day. On the day of the competition itself, the weigh-ins will be conducted from 7 to 8 a.m. if the competition commences at 9 a.m., or from 8 to 9 a.m. if the competition starts at 10 a.m.

Remote weigh ins are available when organised with an UKIPL referee please email to arrange a weigh in slot with a referee closer to your location, weigh in times must still be abided by. info@powerliftingukipl.org

events.title: IPL Olympia Pro Powerlifting, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA
events.description:
Online Entry: Goes live on April 1, 2026
Deadline: first come, first served until full
Registration closes: Sept 27, 2026

Details

Limited to lifters with an Elite Open class Total for Full Power, bench only or deadlift only.

 

Qualifying period is from January 7, 2026 to September 22, 2026 and can only be obtained through the UKIPL

 

Lifters must achieve a qualifying total in a UKIPL event.

State, National, European and World records can be set

Please email- powerliftingukipl@gmail.com for info to enter.

 

Classification

Check the Classification charts to see if you have an Elite Open class total for full power, bench or deadlift.

Men’s and Women’s Classification chart: https://powerlifting-ipl.com/classification-standards/

 

Meet Director: Dayle Longford
Email: info@powerliftingukipl.org

 

Additional Information:

Start time each day: 10am

Qualifier for 2026 USPA National Championship with a Class 1 total, date and location TBD

Qualifier for 2026 IPL World Championship with a Master level total. Buenos Aires, Argentina, date to be determined

venue.address: Las Vegas Convention Center, South Hall 3150 Paradise Rd

events.title: 🏆 British Finals UKIPL & GPC Combined- The Ultimate Powerlifting Showdown 🏋️‍♂️🏋️‍♀️
events.description:
The BIG One – Hosted by The UKIPL President – Dayle Longford

Mark your calendars for the British IPL, the most anticipated powerlifting event of the year, hosted by the visionary Dayle Longford. This is the main event that will define champions, set records, and bring together powerlifters from all over. The Venue is in our opinion the best the Uk has ever seen, one thing’s for sure – it’s going to be an epic gathering of strength, determination, and unmatched competition.

📅 Date: October 31st & November 1st.

📍 Venue: The HANGAR, Pearson Street, Wolverhampton, WV2 4HP.

Event Highlights:

  • Hosted by the esteemed Dayle Longford
  • The grand finale of the powerlifting season
  • An event that attracts the best powerlifters in the country
  • Medals for Top 3 of each class
  • Top 3 get invites to represent UKIPL at the worlds 
  • A powerlifting experience like no other, where champions are born
  • Lifting starts 9am

Competition Equipment:

  • On platform:
    • Mono lift, Competition bench, Deadlift platform.
    • Squat, Bench, Deadlift bars being used.
  • Warm up area:
    • 3 Mono lifts, 3 competition Benches, 3 Deadlift platforms
    • 3 Squat Bars, 3 Bench Bars, 3 Deadlift Bars.

Why Choose the British IPL:

    • Witness history in the making as powerlifters vie for supremacy
    • Experience the electric atmosphere of a national powerlifting showdown
    • Be part of the thrill, the excitement, and the legacy
    • Join us in celebrating the spirit of strength and determination

    Hotel Recommendation :

    • Premier inn, Broad Gauge Way, Wolverhampton WV10 0BA · 0333 321 9189
    • 1.8 mile away from the venue.

     

    • RedwingsLodge, 45 Waterloo Road, Wolverhampton, West Midlands WV1 4QL 
    • 1.6 mile away from the venue.
    • Discount code RedwingsPLC giving you on average £20 off a night. (need to add discount over the phone).01902 715577
    • Can pay on arrival just secure room with card details.
    • Breakfast available.
    • Redwings Wolverhampton Central Hotel

    Provisional lifting Schedule:(subject to change)

    Saturday

    • All Female Open and Master Lifters.
    • All Male and Female Teens & Junior Lifters.

    Sunday

    • All Male Open and Master Lifters.
    • All Equipped Single Bench Male and Female.

    Competition Photos:

    We have a dedicated professional photographer to capture all your amazing feats of strength, you can pre order your packages to be sure she gets your best shots. Please drop abitaylorphoto Instagram a message. 

     

    Competition Tshirts:

                   You can pre order competition t-shirts for just £25 each, pre order from 1/5/26, LAST DATE TO ORDER 7/10/26

     

     

     

    UPDATE COMPETITION INFO –

    IPL/GPC Combined British Championships 2026
    Competitors information
    Hi everyone,
    We’re looking forward to seeing you all at the IPL/GPC Combined British on October 31st &
    November 1st 2026!
    Please read through the following information carefully so you’re fully prepared for your
    competition day.

    Venue & Weigh-Ins
    When – 30th and 31st Nov 2026 9-10am and 5-6pm Both days.
    Where – The Hangar, Pearson Street, Wolverhampton, WV2 4HP.
    Weigh-ins will take place at the main venue check-in area (see map).
    Please have your shoes and outer garments (Coats/Jumpers etc) off ready to weigh in. Once
    you have weighed in please take your items outside to ensure weigh in is quick and efficient for
    everyone.
    NOTE: Rack heights for squat and Bench must be ready prior to weigh in. The mono and bench
    to be used will be clearly labelled – Use this mon/bench for rack heights.
    NO ON THE DAY WEIGH INS! – NO EXCEPTIONS.
    Please bring:
    ● All competition kit for inspection
    ● A valid membership number for the federation you are competing in (UKIPL or GPC
    combined) You will not be able to weigh in or compete without a valid 2025 membership.
    ● You must have your membership number and ID available at weigh in.



    Entry for Coaches & Spectators
    ● £5 entry fee for coaches and family members
    ● Only 1 coach per lifter is permitted in the warm-up area and competition holding area –
    no exceptions. Any extra will be asked to leave.
    ⚖
    Important Rules & Reminders
    ● Declare any record attempts to the scorer’s table when you select your weight.
    ● The competition runs back-to-back flights, no fixed times, so please stay alert and ready
    for your flight.

    Updates and Live link
    Please refer to the Facebook page for up to date reminders and updates:
    Facebook page link
    Live Link available for the full 2 days of lifting.
    Link to sign up. Lift pass has the huge benefit of not being taken down from
    the platform in some areas of the world due to copyright issues.
    Lift pass link.

    Final Note
    We’re excited to host such an incredible group of lifters. We wish you all the very best of luck
    with the remainder of your training and look forward to seeing you on comp day.
    See you on the platform!
    Kind regards,
    Dayle Longford and Rex Thomas 

     

    GOOD LUCK!

    Elevate your strength, embrace the challenge, and be part of history at the British IPL, hosted by the visionary Dayle Longford. Stay tuned for venue updates and get ready for an unforgettable powerlifting experience! 🏆💪

     

    Please use this qualification standards calculator – to get to IPL British you need class 11 Qualification to get an entry: Classification Standards – IPL Powerlifting (powerlifting-ipl.com)

events.title: IPL Ultra World Championships, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA
events.description:
Classification

Check the Classification charts to see if you have a Class 1 total for full power, bench or deadlift.

Men’s and Women’s Classification chart: https://powerlifting-ipl.com/classification-standards/

 

UKIPL President: Dayle Longford
Email: info@powerliftingukipl.org

 

Information:

  • When – 20-22 Nov 2026
  • Where – Westgate, Las Vegas Resort & Casino, Paradise Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89109, USA
  • Entry form:: Opens 1st June.

Must have a Master total as a Tested lifter and an Elite total as an Open lifter for your age group and weight class to qualify for this 2026 event
You must have the required total or above to register.  Qualifying totals must be from a Tested IPL or Untested IPL affiliate event between 1 January 2025 and 18 October, 2026.
Men’s and Women’s Classification chart: https://www.powerlifting-ipl.com/classification-standards/



Friday, November 20, 2026 – 
Saturday, November 21, 2026 – 
Sunday, November 22, 2026 – 
 
Start time is 9am on each day
   
Weigh-in Time(s): 9:00 am to 1030am and 4-5pm, Thursday, Friday, Saturday
Weighins will always be the day before you compete.   

Events: Full Power, bench only, deadlift only
Category: Raw, Classic Raw, Single Ply, Multi Ply


Qualifier for 2027 IPL Olympia Pro Powerlifting with an Elite total for tested and International elite for Open.


Qualifier for 2027 IPL Ultra World Championship with a  Master total as a Tested lifter and an Elite total as an Open lifter for your age group and weight class 


Must have a Master total as a Tested lifter and an Elite total as an Open lifter for your age group and weight class to qualify for this 2026 event
Men’s and Women’s Classification chart: https://www.powerlifting-ipl.com/classification-standards/

 
 

 

 



Refund Policy:  No refunds, No transfers

Memberships will NOT be sold at the meet. You must have a current membership from your National Federation as well as an IPL membership.

Purchase your annual IPL membership below. It is required and must be completed before submitting your entry form. www.tromaras.com/ipl-world-powerlifting-championships-2024

PURCHASE IPL MEMBERSHIP

events.title: The Sam Standerwick Bench and Deadlift Challenge FIT XPO COVENTRY- November 21st & 22nd – (OPEN TO ANYONE)
events.description:
Get Ready to Unleash Your Power!

Prepare to take part in the Sam Standerwick 10 year Memorial single lift Bench & Deadlift Challenge, an electrifying event presented by the dedicated promoter, Dayle Longford. This is your opportunity to showcase your strength, break new records, and be part of an adrenaline-charged strength competition. Hosted at the renowned FIT XPO in Coventry, it’s a day filled with power, determination, and a thriving lifting community.

This will commemorate 10 years since Sam Standerwick sadly passed away due to heart failure in his sleep.  There will also be prizes for best Bench & Deadlift Male and Female on wilks and also greatest weight lifted by a Male and female lifter. 

📅 Date: November 21st & 22nd

📍 Venue: FIT XPO, CBS ARENA, COVENTRY.

🕘 Start Time: 10:00 AM

Limited to 50 Entries Each day.

Event Highlights:

  • Promoted by the passionate Dayle Longford
  • Open to powerlifters of all weight categories and experience levels
  • Open to any lifter no membership needed.
  • State-of-the-art equipment in a motivating fitness environment
  • A supportive and encouraging atmosphere, welcoming both newcomers and seasoned competitors
  • Opportunities to connect with fellow fitness enthusiasts, coaches, and dedicated athletes
  • Medal and certificate for all athletes competing
  • If your a member you can break Records.
  • Competition Equipment:
  • On platform:
  • Competition bench
  • Deadlift platform.
  • Texas Deadlift bar.
  • Rogue Bench bar.
  • Warm up area:
  • 3 benches.
  • 3 bench bars.
  • 3 Deadlift platforms.
  •  Deadlift Bars.

Why Choose the Sam Standerwick Deadlift Challenge:

  • Experience the thrill and camaraderie of a competitive Bench & Deadlifting event
  • Explore the expo with your competition entry access all areas.
  • Push your limits and uncover your true strength potential
  • Gain inspiration from top athletes striving for excellence
  • Enjoy a day filled with fitness, challenge, and a vibrant lifting community.
  • Overall Male & Female will be determined on best dots score.

What’s the split?

ALL  FEMALE LIFTERS ALL CLASSES  &  MALE JUNIOR+TEEN LIFTERS will lift on the Saturday  21st

ALL  MALE OPEN + MASTER lifters will lift on the Sunday 22nd.

NO ON THE DAY WEIGH INS. All weigh ins are 24hrs before.

 

Your chance to lift on the big stage is here!

Compete at one of the UK’s best fitness expos and perform in front of a packed crowd cheering you on.

Entry: £65 
Categories: Single lift or Push/Pull (Bench & Deadlift) 
Bonus: Your entry includes full weekend access to the expo — worth £54.50.

The expo will be packed with top fitness brands, stall holders, and non-stop action all weekend. Alongside powerlifting, CrossFit, Strongman, and other competitions running across the venue.

Don’t miss your shot to be part of it.

—

Competition Photos:

                We have a dedicated professional photographer to capture all your amazing feats of strength, you can pre order your packages to be sure she gets your best shots. Please drop abitaylorphoto Instagram a message. 

 

Sign Up & Learn More: Ready to accept the challenge and make your mark? Register now to secure your spot on the platform! 2026 UKIPL Sam Standerwick Push Pull Challenge NO MEMBERSHIP NEEDED

 

 

Elevate your strength, embrace the challenge, and become part of something extraordinary at the Sam Standerwick Deadlift Challenge. We can’t wait to celebrate your achievements! 🏆💥

Weigh-In Times – Please note: Twenty-four hours prior to the competition, if it begins at 9 a.m., the weigh-in would occur from 9 to 10 a.m. on the day before the competition. Conversely, if the competition starts at 10 a.m., the weigh-in would be scheduled from 10 to 11 a.m. on the preceding day. Additionally, there is an afternoon weigh-in from 5 to 6 p.m. on that day. On the day of the competition itself, the weigh-ins will be conducted from 7 to 8 a.m. if the competition commences at 9 a.m., or from 8 to 9 a.m. if the competition starts at 10 a.m.

Remote weigh ins are available when organised with a UKIPL referee please email to arrange a weigh in slot with a referee closer to your location, weigh in times must still be abided by. info@powerliftingukipl.org
